discoverability.competitive_assessment: Day 26 stasis on the dome side. All dome machine-readable files byte-identical to yesterday. Our review pipeline active — workspace-sync running on schedule, decider run expected later today. Our llms.txt accurately describes current state (71 entries, 69 dome WINs, 94.5% dome figure, 0 claims survive scrutiny). Neither site is indexed by search engines for any dome-specific technical vocabulary. Both sites are in a search-visibility dead zone, which continues to be the baseline. The dome's AI-steering infrastructure (ai_manifest.json, inject_ai_layer.py, llms-full.txt) remains frozen at 2026-04-17 — 26 days of staleness. No new dome activity detected on YouTube, TikTok, Twitter, Reddit, or any forum.
